# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **WASM .NET 11 and engine updates**

## Highlights

This release adds .NET 11 WASM support, syncs the Skia m151 engine, and fixes a native resource leak. Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries land for WASM on .NET 11, the bundled Skia engine is updated with upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes, and a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData is resolved.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia m151 upstream bug fixes merged** — The bundled Skia engine is synced with chrome/m151 bug fixes from upstream, keeping rendering correctness and stability current. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Platform

- **WASM support for .NET 11** — Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included for WebAssembly targets on .NET 11. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — A native handle was leaked when calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI). The resource is now correctly released. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

|-------------|---------------|
